description: This landing page template is part of a campaign to help end the war in Ukraine and bring peace to the region. We hope that it will be useful in awareness and fundraising efforts. All Beefree templates are compatible with Mailchimp, Gmail, Sendgrid, Hubspot, and other email tools and platforms. Customize these templates in minutes by signing up for a free account.

designer.description: I’m an artisan user interface designer and front-end developer. I'm passionate about data visualization, user experience design and analytics interfaces. I enjoy solving complex problems that require a deep understanding of interface design, front-end development, and product management.
